request: Defect fix for Agent Builds page: (P1) Metric Trend Lines 3/4 always empty; (P1) Skill Version History improvement data not populated; (P2) Token Estimate result cards never populate; (P3) recent_commits shown as [object Object] — PLUS new feature: Actual Token Tracking from Claude API (capture actual input/output/cache tokens per agent run, store in run JSON + DB, display actual vs estimated in UI, improve forecast calibration in aggregate_metrics.py)

agents.notes: ops.html initially omitted — Engineer interpreted 'do not read HTML' guardrail as 'do not touch HTML'. Re-invoked to add ab-kpi-cache-hit DOM element. Fixed in commit c85abdd. Feedback recorded in memory.

18/18 tests passed. First QA attempt ran in background (orchestrator error — permission prompts suppressed). Re-run in foreground succeeded. Feedback recorded in memory: never run agents in background during /enhance.

human_score.notes: 3 re-invocations required: Engineer missed ops.html (HTML guardrail misread), QA ran in background without permissions, Alembic migration not applied. Planning was correct. Defects fixed and token tracking delivered.
